name: focused-review
description: Stage-first focused read-only review recipe: parallel runtime/API/docs/release lenses followed by aggregate triage for the runtime task.

tasks.prompt: Review runtime, state, concurrency, timeout, worktree, and artifact-consistency risks for the target described in the runtime task. Do not modify files. Return only evidence-backed findings with severity, file path, rationale, and concrete recommendation. If no issues are found, say so explicitly.

Review command/API/documentation consistency for the target described in the runtime task. Do not modify files. Return evidence-backed findings about mismatched docs, unclear UX, or schema/runtime drift. Include file paths and concrete recommendations.

Review release hygiene, test coverage, packaging, and workflow risks for the target described in the runtime task. Do not modify files. Return evidence-backed findings with severity, file path, and concrete recommendation.

stages.prompt: Using Source Stage Context and the runtime task, deduplicate and triage the review findings. Do not modify files. Return Markdown with: Must fix, Should fix, Defer, and No-action observations. Preserve file-path evidence.

useWhen: focused review across runtime api docs release readiness
